blended.narrative: Sugarbush is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 397 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
